edit_summary: Resolved reviewer-B round-1 Majors: defined the effort-resolution priority order (requested>risk-matrix>role-default>model-default; role_defaults' effort component structurally inert under welded policy, preserving the byte-identical golden), expanded effort_source to 5 attributed values, rewrote AC-011/AC-012 accordingly, and added AC-051 (Codex-host degradation via effort_control, host-agnostic) and AC-052 (argv-composition rejects out-of-vocabulary model/effort values, giving Security Boundary B3 an executable verification surface).
